gist.headline: Fresh pollen packs
gist.blurb: We've revamped our checkout with a shiny new ladder of Pollen packs. Grab exactly what you need to keep your digital garden blooming, complete with sweet bonus tiers!
gist.summary: Updated the Stripe checkout system to introduce a new catalog of Pollen packs ranging from $2 to $100, complete with built-in bonus grants.
gist.impact: Users can now purchase specific Pollen packs with clear bonus tiers directly from the updated balance and pricing pages.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about buying 'Pollen packs' (credits) via Stripe. Visuals: The bee mascot (Polly) at a cute little market stall or exchange counter, trading coins for glowing jars of golden pollen/nectar. A chunky robot companion holding a receipt or a shopping basket.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot running a tiny wooden market stall, trading shiny coins for glowing jars of golden nectar. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holds a small shopping basket. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic. Text in pixel font: 'POLLEN PACKS'.
